title: [DOCS] Add -cpp flag to podman build man page.
body: This PR: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3994 added the `--cpp` flag to the buildah bud command.  Adding this issue as a reminder that once Buildah v1.26.2 or later is vendored into Podman, then the man page changes from that PR should also be added to the `podman build` man pages.

comments.body: This flag is already documented in podman-build(1), closing
